text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was able to binge all the wrestling matches I'd
been waiting to watch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm feeling motivated and ready to tackle
whatever training you have to throw at me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: In fact, I'm lookin' forward to it!
